rationale: The current best script already benefits from late soft roundtrips, but it hard-snaps fp16-kept tensors like the tied embedding and fp16 rescue blocks on every quant-aware pass. This change compounds that path by keeping the existing projection ramp while turning fp16-kept tensors into a softer nudge toward their final cast until the final exact roundtrip, which should preserve late training dynamics while still aligning the weights with the artifact that is actually scored.
title: Soft FP16-Keep Quant-Aware Ramp
